title: Italian Chicken Fritters
description: Crunchy Italian-style fritters filled with flavorful chicken and herbs. Serve as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together chicken, garlic, and italian seasoning.
Add flora and mix until well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the chicken mixture into the skillet.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Transfer the fritters to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with dzatzik for dipping.
